paper_title: Elastic Weight Consolidation Improves the Robustness of Self-Supervised Learning Methods under Transfer

methodology.main_approach: Elastic Weight Consolidation (EWC) for improving robustness of Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) methods under transfer
models_used: DINO models pre-trained with ViT-B/16 architecture
DINO models pre-trained with ResNet50 architecture
methodology.validation_method: Analyzing reverse transfer performance from CIFAR10 fine-tuning
methodology.problem_addressed: Catastrophic forgetting during fine-tuning of SSL models

results.fim_issue: FIM for ViT-B/16 is poorly conditioned, making it impossible to fully recover SSL performance on ImageNet1k
results.solution_proposed: Method to alleviate poor conditioning of FIM for ViT-B/16

title: Elastic Weight Consolidation Improves the Robustness of Self-Supervised Learning Methods under Transfer
